cache.name: cache
cache.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cache(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, data TEXT NOT NULL, ttl INT NOT NULL)
cache.set: INSERT INTO cache (id, data, ttl) VALUES(:id, :data, :ttl) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET data = :data, ttl = :ttl

daily.name: daily
daily.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS daily(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, data TEXT NOT NULL, ttl INT NOT NULL)
daily.set: INSERT INTO daily (id, data, ttl) VALUES(:id, :data, :ttl) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET data = :data, ttl = :ttl

minute.name: minute
minute.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS minute(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, data TEXT NOT NULL, ttl INT NOT NULL)
minute.set: INSERT INTO minute (id, data, ttl) VALUES(:id, :data, :ttl) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET data = :data, ttl = :ttl
